seo.title: D54 Battle Pistol - Guide, Stats, Mods & More - Marathon
seo.description: Find out everything you need to know about D54 Battle Pistol in Marathon: stats, mods, sources and more.

children.text: The D54 Battle Pistol is a new pistol being added in Season 2. It thrives in 1v1 duels and close encounters.

A fantastic weapon for close encounters and 1v1 duels, the D54 comes with a red dot sight and fires full-auto three-round bursts. It’s a high-handling, medium rate-of-fire sidearm — think a hybrid between the BR33 Volley Rifle and the BRRT SMG — a perfect companion for sniper rifles and other long-range weapons.
, learn their stats, compatible mods and fundamental tips.
